name: test-xtiles
description:
Test xTiles plugin — Break down ideas into tasks and save them directly to your xTiles workspace.

  ⚙️  Setup required:
  1. Go to https://stage.xtiles.app/ → Settings → Integrations → API Tokens
  2. Click "Create token" and copy it
  3. Paste it when prompted during installation

  💡 Usage: /action-plan <your idea or project description>

XTILES_API_TOKEN.title: xTiles API Token
XTILES_API_TOKEN.description: To get your token: open https://stage.xtiles.app/ → Settings → Integrations → API Tokens → API Tokens → click "Create token" → copy it. Then paste the token here.
